revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Circular_reference%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Circular_reference%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
{{tsh|cir}}
{{High-use}}
{{style}}

===Usage===
{{tlx|Circular reference|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}}

For tagging references that [[WP:CIRCULAR|cite Wikipedia itself]], a [[Wikipedia:Mirrors and forks|mirror or fork]], or a [[Wikipedia:Republishers|republished work]]. It places the page with the tagged reference into [[:Category:All articles lacking reliable references]] and the dated subcategory of [[:Category:Articles lacking reliable references]].

===TemplateData===
{{TemplateData header}}
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"date": {
			"label": "Month and year",
			"type": "line",
			"autovalue": "May 2025",
			"suggested": true
		}
	},
	"description": "The template is used to tag references that a circular, mirrors or forks, or republished works",
	"format": "inline"
}
</templatedata>

=== See also ===
* {{Tl|Circular}}
* {{tl|Circular reporting}}, for when it's not fully clear whether a source is circular
* {{tl|Self-published inline}}
* {{tl|Primary sources}}
* {{tl|Backwards copy}}
* [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Sources of articles]]
* [[Wikipedia:Template messages/Cleanup]]
{{Inline cleanup tags}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other||
<!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS -->
}}</includeonly>

<noinclude>
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Inline citation and verifiability dispute templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[Category:Neutrality templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
